EXPLANATION: The Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual is an official, publicly available technical documentation provided by Gurobi Optimization, LLC, which is regularly updated and serves as the standard reference for their software. The cited source is a legitimate technical documentation product rather than an academic paper.
LINK: https://www.gurobi.com/documentation/current/refman/index.html
